content: Complete Team Builder and Unit Database Resource

### Database & Builder updates!
- **Finally implemented the "Builds" tab in the DB**, these contains builds exported from the Mythag Compendium, and will hopefully help users get a quick reference of what stats, wheels and covenants to use and focus on for each character.
  - This feature also expands to the builder, where as you're changing "gear" for a unit, certain things will be promoted to the top of the list (There's a toggle for this!!), so that you hopefully can navigate your way easier when creating teams.
- **The DB also includes a Awakener Level slider**, and an OE+ thingy, so that you can scale the characters stats up/down, and see changes to skills as you level them up. Big thanks to Jynn for helping out with the stat scalings here.
- There were also a couple design fixes, and a lot of code rewriting, hopefully I did not break anything in this process..

The builds feature is very new and not super tested, currently it only supports the "default" build for a character that has multiple, I might change this, or change the default builds, not sure yet. 
There might also have been errors when exporting from the Compendium Sheet, though I tried my best to cross-check everything.

If some recommendations feel off/wrong, feel free to reach out <:love:1356053099931897977>
